clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Provide evidence-based recommendations for managing orthostatic hypotension in hypertensive patients
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Hypertension management, medication adjustment, BP control optimization, OH screening
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: OH risk reduction + BP target selection + symptomatic OH assessment

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for OH management recommendations
Show Class of Recommendation with strength
Show Level of Evidence with quality description
Specify patient population (hypertension, intensive therapy, medication initiation)
Display specific clinical action (improved BP control, SBP <130, OH assessment)
Show expected benefit (reduce OH risk, CVD/mortality benefit, detect chronic conditions)

validationRules: Recommendation 2: adults receiving intensive BP-lowering therapy with asymptomatic OH
Recommendation 3: adults with hypertension initiating treatment or adding medication with goal SBP <130 mm Hg

rules: Match patient presentation to appropriate recommendation number
Apply COR strength to clinical decision
Use LOE to determine confidence in recommendation
Generate specific clinical action based on recommendation

recommendations.title: OH Risk Reduction
recommendations.loe_quality: High-quality evidence from >1 RCT or meta-analyses

recommendations.title: Intensive Therapy with Asymptomatic OH
recommendations.population: adults receiving intensive BP-lowering therapy with asymptomatic OH
recommendations.action: treatment with goal of SBP <130 mm Hg
recommendations.loe_quality: High-quality evidence from >1 RCT or meta-analyses

recommendations.title: Symptomatic OH Assessment
recommendations.population: adults with hypertension initiating treatment or adding medication with goal SBP <130 mm Hg
recommendations.loe_quality: Moderate-quality evidence from 1 or more RCTs or meta-analyses of moderate-quality RCTs

loeDescription.description: e.g., 'High-quality evidence from more than 1 RCT'

escalationLogic.ifAnySymptomPresent: Assess for chronic conditions per Recommendation 3
escalationLogic.ifNoSymptoms: Continue intensive therapy per Recommendation 2 if applicable

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Follow COR/LOE guidance for OH management
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag symptomatic OH for chronic condition workup
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log OH assessment and management actions
